rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash (row 1) and gpt-5-mini (row 1). Visually confirmed as a page header with no monetary amounts.
Selected gpt-5-mini (row 2) as gemini-flash missed this marginal header. Description confirmed visually. gpt-5-mini correctly identified it as a header.

Pounds and shillings from consensus (gemini-flash row 2, gpt-5-mini row 3). For pence, gemini-flash identified no digit present; gpt-5-mini interpreted as 0. Visually, the pence column is blank. Following 'as it appears on the page' principle, an empty string is used for pence.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment made at the Christmas festival, amounting to £20 6s 0d.
